red_lines: Threats to Japanese territorial waters (Senkaku Islands)
core_narratives: Economic security and supply chain resilience

decision_history.event_description: US tariffs impacted Japanese automotive exports significantly
decision_history.decision_taken: Engaged in intensive bilateral negotiations, offered concessions on market access while protecting key industries
decision_history.outcome: Ongoing trade friction, alliance relationship stressed but maintained

decision_history.event_description: Proposed Asian NATO concept for regional security
decision_history.decision_taken: Advocated for multilateral security framework in Asia, deepened Quad cooperation and bilateral defense ties
decision_history.outcome: Concept discussed but not formalized; bilateral defense ties strengthened

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: LDP party factions, rural constituencies, defense establishment

military_posture.force_disposition: defensive posture with counterstrike capability development
